steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage describes the delta as “a constantly evolving network… that change in size and shape.” The key signal—”constantly evolving” and “change”—describes something undergoing continuous transformation.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Dynamic directly expresses constant change and activity—matching “constantly evolving” and “change in size and shape.” The other three contradict or miss the point: “immutable” opposes change, “unrivaled” concerns competition, and “sustainable” emphasizes duration. That matches choice A — A is correct.
